title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: Build and maintain high-performance React applications. Work closely with the design team to deliver pixel-perfect UIs and collaborate with backend engineers on API integrations. 3+ years of experience required.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: Drive growth through SEO paid campaigns and social media strategy. Manage ad budgets across Google and Meta platforms and report weekly on KPIs to the CMO. Arabic and English required.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design and build scalable REST APIs and microservices. Own database architecture decisions using MongoDB and PostgreSQL and participate in code reviews. Node.js or Python required.

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Create intuitive and visually stunning user experiences for mobile and web products. Proficiency in Figma required. Run user research sessions and produce high-fidelity prototypes.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze large datasets to uncover business insights and build dashboards using Power BI and Python. Work directly with the product and operations teams. SQL knowledge required.

title: Customer Support Agent
description: Handle incoming customer inquiries via chat and email. Resolve issues promptly and escalate complex cases to the appropriate department. Arabic and English fluency required.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines cloud infrastructure on AWS and containerized workloads using Docker and Kubernetes. On-call rotation required once per month.

title: Financial Analyst Intern
description: Support the finance team with financial modeling variance analysis and monthly reporting. Excel and basic knowledge of accounting principles required. Great learning opportunity.

title: Content Writer Arabic
description: Write engaging Arabic-language content for blogs social media and email campaigns in the tech and lifestyle niches. SEO knowledge is a plus. Fully remote position.

title: HR Manager
description: Lead recruitment onboarding and employee relations for a team of 80+. Implement HR policies manage payroll coordination and run quarterly performance reviews.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor and protect company infrastructure against threats. Conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration testing. Experience with SIEM tools required. CISSP or CEH certification preferred.

title: Graphic Designer
description: Create visual content for digital and print campaigns including social media posts banners and brand materials. Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite required.

title: Project Manager
description: Lead cross-functional teams to deliver software projects on time and within budget. PMP certification preferred. Strong communication and stakeholder management skills required.

title: iOS Developer
description: Develop and maintain native iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI. Collaborate with backend engineers and designers to ship high-quality features to App Store.

title: SEO Specialist
description: Optimize website content and technical structure to improve organic search rankings. Perform keyword research competitor analysis and monthly reporting. Google Analytics and Search Console proficiency required.

title: Accountant
description: Manage daily bookkeeping prepare financial statements and assist with audits. Experience with Xero or QuickBooks required. CPA certification is a plus.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description: Provide Level 2 technical support for enterprise software clients. Troubleshoot hardware and software issues and document resolutions in the knowledge base.

title: Copywriter
description: Write compelling copy for websites emails ads and landing pages. Experience with A/B testing and conversion rate optimization preferred. Portfolio required.

title: Android Developer
description: Build and maintain Android applications using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Work in an agile team delivering features for a fintech super-app used by millions.

title: Legal Counsel
description: Provide legal advice on corporate commercial and employment matters. Draft and review contracts regulatory filings and compliance documents. 5+ years experience required.
